description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a light-colored exterior and a combination of flat and gently sloped roof sections. The property is surrounded by a white picket fence and includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, as well as a small garden area with rows of plants. The backyard is landscaped with several mature trees, a hammock, and a patio area, providing ample outdoor living space. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing natural light into the interior rooms, which are partially visible and furnished. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch with climbing plants, and the overall design is compact yet open, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and wooden or metal trim.
description: A single-story bungalow with a light exterior, flat and sloped roof sections, a carport, garden, and fenced yard with trees and a hammock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch with climbing plants, carport, and partial interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, garden rows, and a glimpse of the backyard trees and hammock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, mature trees, hammock, and patio area, with less visibility of the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, trees, hammock, and the side of the house with visible windows and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
